evals.prompt: Help me tune my bot's config. I want to know if my bb_width_threshold and RSI thresholds are well calibrated based on actual historical data.
evals.expected_output: Shows current config values, then per-symbol analysis: bb_width percentile distribution vs current threshold (showing % time in RANGING), RSI values at actual BUY/SELL signals vs thresholds, volume spike rate, BUY signal frequency, SELL counts by regime. Ends with non-prescriptive observations. Never modifies files.

evals.prompt: Is my volume_factor setting too strict? I feel like the bot isn't trading enough. Can you check the data?
evals.expected_output: Shows volume spike rate (% of bars with spike) alongside current volume_factor and volume_period. Flags if spike rate is very low (<5%). Also shows BUY signal frequency. Includes observations section. Does not recommend a specific value to change to.
